meta_description: Access the databanks for troubleshooting, guides, and secure communication channels.
category_getting_started_desc: System startup and basic configuration protocols.
category_troubleshooting_desc: Diagnostics for connection and tunneling errors.
category_security_desc: Details on Anti-DPI, obfuscation, and zero-logs policies.
faq_getting_started_1_q: How do I initialize my first connection?
faq_getting_started_1_a: Download the CyberVPN core module for your OS, authenticate with your Neural ID, and click 'Engage'.
faq_getting_started_2_a: The network accepts connections from Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, and Android clients via standard Xray/Sing-box protocols.
faq_getting_started_3_q: Can I connect multiple devices simultaneously?
faq_getting_started_3_a: Yes, depending on your Access Credit tier, you can link up to 10 concurrent neural pathways.
faq_troubleshooting_1_q: Why is my connection speed degraded?
faq_troubleshooting_1_a: Check your node's ping. If packet loss exceeds 5%, reroute to an alternate shard in the Server Grid.
faq_troubleshooting_2_q: What if the primary proxy fails?
faq_troubleshooting_2_a: The system automatically engages fallback routing. If manual override is needed, flush your DNS cache and reconnect.
faq_troubleshooting_3_q: How do I bypass DPI restrictions?
faq_troubleshooting_3_a: Our core utilizing VLESS+Reality automatically masks your traffic as standard HTTPS. Ensure you have the latest core update applied.
faq_billing_1_q: How do I increase my bandwidth quota?
faq_billing_1_a: You can acquire additional Access Credits via the Billing terminal using supported crypto or fiat gateways.
faq_billing_2_q: Are refunds available for inactive cycles?
faq_billing_2_a: Refunds are processed strictly within the first 72 hours of establishing a new connection cycle.
faq_billing_3_a: Affirmative. We accept Monero (XMR), USDT, and Bitcoin for completely untraceable transactions.
faq_security_1_a: Negative. All databanks are volatile. We operate on a strict zero-knowledge architecture.
faq_security_2_a: We utilize ChaCha20-Poly1305 and AES-256-GCM ciphers, providing military-grade cryptographic integrity.
faq_security_3_q: Do you offer a Kill Switch?
faq_security_3_a: Yes. If the secure tunnel drops, the client immediately terminates all external network adapters to prevent IP leaks.
contact_desc: Unable to resolve your anomaly in the archives? Establish a direct secure comm channel with our operators.
